title: 8 Pack Self-Adhesive Rhinestone Stickers for Kids - Glitter Gems with 8 Designs (Unicorn, Flowers, Leaves, Butterfly) - Acryl Gem Stickers for Crafts, DIY Decor for Water Bottles, Photo Frames, Party
features: ◼ 8 Unique Designs – Includes unicorns, flowers, leaves, butterflies, crowns, stars, moons and hearts in vibrant colours (red, yellow, blue, pink, purple).
◼ Self-Stick & Long-Lasting – Pre-coated adhesive back requires no glue, leaves no residue, stays firmly on glass, plastic or metal surfaces.
◼ Premium Acrylic Material – Scratch-resistant, high-gloss finish that's non-toxic and safe for children's crafts.
◼ Perfect for DIY Projects – Decorate water bottles, photo frames, greeting cards, mirrors, party decorations and more.
◼ Boosts Creativity – Encourages fine motor skills development and imaginative play for kids ages 3+.
description: Product Title: ◼ 8 Pack Self-Adhesive Rhinestone Stickers for Kids - Acryl Gem Stickers for Crafts, DIY Decor for Water Bottles, Photo Frames, Party Specification: ◼ Material: High-quality acrylic (glossy, shatter-resistant) ◼ Size: Individual gems approx. 1-2cm (varies by design) ◼ Package: 8 sheets with different patterns (200+ stickers total) Product Advantages: ◼ No Messy Glue Needed – Peel-and-stick convenience ◼ Repositionable – Can be removed without residue ◼ Water-Resistant – Stays on outdoor items like drink bottles Perfect For: ✔ Children's crafts (age 3+ with supervision) ✔ DIY enthusiasts & hobbyists ✔ Party decorations & gift wrapping Notes: ◼ Colours may vary slightly due to monitor settings ◼ Hand-measured sizes - please allow ±1mm tolerance ◼ Stickers only - accessories pictured not included Customer Support: Contact us anytime with questions !
